retrieved_result: Why Stucco Cracks Why Stucco Cracks Sep22Posted by Jabuka Home Inspections Posted in Blog3Unfortunately many of today’s consumers are receiving inaccurate information regarding cracks in stucco. As a result, the mere sight of a hairline crack causes great concern. It is the purpose of this article to define “normal”
